message:
chore(beads): complete Ecosystem Parity bead structure review

Structural improvements:
- Link WebSocket frame codec (bd-r4hu) and handshake (bd-1kg0) to
  WebSocket sub-epic (bd-ku6n) as parent-child
- Add missing ecosystem-parity labels to frame codec, handshake, and
  main epic beads

New beads created for Debug Console completeness:
- bd-zd26: Task inspector (detailed task state, await points, waker info)
- bd-257b: Obligation tracker (real-time obligations and leak detection)
- bd-23lw: Budget monitor (consumption tracking with exhaustion prediction)

All these were listed in Debug Console sub-epic but had no beads. Now all
7 children mentioned in the sub-epic have corresponding implementation beads:
1. Console rendering primitives (bd-nugw)
2. Region tree visualization (bd-1ctm)
3. Task inspector (bd-zd26) - NEW
4. Obligation tracker (bd-257b) - NEW
5. Budget monitor (bd-23lw) - NEW
6. Explain why diagnostics (bd-qctz)
7. Debug console E2E tests (bd-1jkx)

Verification:
- No dependency cycles detected
- All sub-epics properly structured
- 39 ecosystem-parity beads total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
